title: Prompt Lifecycle Enhancements (B-series DAG + Commit Tracking + Modernization)
summary: Extend the Workpack Protocol with three capabilities: (1) B-series bug-fix prompts can declare dependencies via a DAG, enabling parallel execution and proper ordering; (2) each prompt must commit its changes to the bootstrap branch and record branch name and commit SHA in its output.json, with the integration prompt verifying commit existence and file consistency; (3) a repeatable legacy-to-modern workpack migration method plus maintenance prompt templates for bug reporting and task add/modify.

prompts.agent_role: Initialize feature branch, verify baseline, read current protocol spec
Design and implement B-series dependency DAG: spec, schemas, templates, linter
Design and implement per-prompt commit tracking: output schema, spec, templates
Extend integration prompt pattern to verify commits and file consistency
Define legacy-to-modern migration workflow and add maintenance prompt templates
V1 gate: compile, test, lint, cross-check all acceptance criteria
Add missing protocol 2.2.0 changelog entry and align release notes
Backfill prompt commit SHA audit trail and align integration verification
